description: Lock DNA synthesis and oligonucleotides to practical phosphoramidite oligonucleotide synthesis rather than generic DNA-structure discovery or CRISPR awards.

checks.reason: The node is scoped to practical synthetic oligonucleotide production, anchored to phosphoramidite-method publications rather than the 1953 DNA-structure discovery.
Phosphoramidite oligonucleotide synthesis is itself a controlled chemical synthesis method.
